basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS)
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) Recruitment 2026: Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Institute of Medical Sciences has released the official notification for 1 Research Associate I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/Physical handicapped and women candidate.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in stem cell biology, biochemistry, cell biology, molecular biology or 3 years of research experience after MSc with at least one SCI paper
qualification.details: Ph.D. in the research area of stem cell biology, biochemistry, cell biology, molecular biology or having 3 years of research experience after postgraduation (MSc.) and at least one research paper in Science Citation Indexed (SCI) journal.

selection_process: Shortlisting Interview (hybrid mode: online and offline)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SGPGIMS Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SGPGIMS Research Associate I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate I position at SGPGIMS is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in stem cell biology, biochemistry, cell biology, molecular biology, or have 3 years of research experience after MSc with at least one SCI paper.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate I post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Research Associate I role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview, which may be conducted in a hybrid mode (online and offline).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed monthly salary of Rs. 69,600 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with your application.

faq.question: Q9. Does SGPGIMS offer any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, SGPGIMS offers an age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST/Physical handicapped and women candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is advisable to read it thoroughly before applying.
